loginSubtitle: Sign in to your Ibn Sina account
forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link

passwordHint: Min. 8 characters, one uppercase letter, number, and special character

errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.passwordWeak: Password is too weak — needs 8+ chars, uppercase, number, and symbol
